name: Fox and Geese
author: traditional / AGP port
description: Classic asymmetric hunt game on the cross-shaped board of 33 points. 15 Geese (move forward/sideways, never back, no captures) try to trap the lone Fox; the Fox steps freely and jumps geese like draughts (multi-jumps chain). Geese move first. Geese win by trapping the fox; the fox wins by reducing the geese to two.
